/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgeneralized_pose_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libgeneralized_pose_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/generalized_pose_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/generalized_pose_msgs/msg/detail/generalized_pose__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/generalized_pose_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/generalized_pose_msgs/msg/detail/generalized_pose_with_time__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/generalized_pose_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/generalized_pose_msgs/msg/detail/generalized_poses_with_time__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
